creator: john.wolfe@broadcom.com
text:
open-vm-tools 12.4.0 was released on March 21, 2024.

There are no new features in the open-vm-tools 12.4.0 release. This is primarily a maintenance release that addresses a number of issues:

For complete details, see: https://github.com/vmware/open-vm-tools/releases/tag/stable-12.4.0

 * A Github pull request has been handled. Please see the Resolved Issues section of the Release Notes.

 * A number of issues flagged by Coverity have been addressed.

Release Notes are available at: https://github.com/vmware/open-vm-tools/blob/stable-12.4.0/ReleaseNotes.md

The granular changes that have gone into the 12.4.0 release are in the ChangeLog at: https://github.com/vmware/open-vm-tools/blob/stable-12.4.0/open-vm-tools/ChangeLog
